issues.description: TrashFromHand filter is incorrect. The effect says 'trash 1 card from your hand' without restriction to Character type, meaning any card type (Character, Event, Stage) can be trashed.

ReturnToHand target scope is wrong. The effect says 'Return up to 1 Character' without specifying opponent's Character, so it should target any Character (yours or opponent's) with the power restriction.
The power restriction should specify 'basePower' instead of 'maxPower' since the text explicitly says '6000 base power'.
